description: Dark abstract tendrils using curl noise flow lines with ridged multifractal modulation. Eldritch horror vibes.
example_prompts: use curl noise modulated by ridged multifractal for dark cosmic tendrils
create eldritch void patterns with flow-field tendrils and sharp ridge modulation
generate abstract dark horror texture using curl fields and ridged noise

screenshot_metadata.notes: Dark background with bright accent tendrils. Use particle advection along curl field for line rendering.
